description: Imports settings, keybindings, and extensions for VS Code Stable and Insiders.

messages.done: All settings and extensions applied successfully!
messages.settingsNotFound: settings.json not found in script directory.
messages.extensionsNotFound: extensions.json not found in script directory.
messages.cliNotFound: CLI command not found in PATH -- skipping this edition.
messages.scriptDisabled: VS Code settings sync is disabled in config.
messages.notAdmin: This script must be run as Administrator.

commands.(default): Replace mode -- back up and overwrite settings
commands.-Merge: Deep-merge incoming settings into existing settings.json
